products.product_description: This phone comes with a 16.25 (6.4) Full HD+ Infinity-U Display with a refresh rate of up to 120 Hz so that you can enjoy smooth multitasking and vibrant visuals

The OPPO K13 Turbo 5G is a performance-focused gaming smartphone. It features a 6.78-inch 120Hz 1.5K AMOLED display, the MediaTek Dimensity 8450 chipset, and a massive 7000mAh battery with 80W charging
The S Series (e.g., Vivobook S14/S16) features sleek, all-metal chassis designs, beautiful OLED displays, and dedicated AI keys. They are ultra-slim, lightweight, and boast 18+ hours of battery life

Hatsun Curd is a thick, creamy, and preservative-free dahi made from pasteurized toned milk. It is widely used for everyday meals, raitas, and lassis. A 500g pouch generally costs around ₹37–₹42, while 1kg tubs or pouches range from ₹115 to ₹120

Nike Court Vision Low Men's Shoes In love with the old-school style of '80s basketball? Meet the Court Vision. It combines synthetic leather with a rubber cupsole, bringing you all-day comfort inspired by some of the most iconic silhouettes of the past.
